wage_reference.name: GGMMI / RMMMG
wage_reference.note: Belgian national minimum wage reference for full-time private-sector employees. Sectoral minima may be higher.

social_security.employee_contribution_note: Standard employee ONSS contribution rate for private-sector employees.
social_security.employer_contribution_note: Base employer contribution rate for the private market sector before reductions.

structural_reduction.source: ONSS / RSZ administrative instructions 2026/2, structural reduction, category 1
structural_reduction.note: Prototype full-time monthly implementation. The quarterly reference wage S is approximated as gross monthly wage multiplied by 3. Negative components are set to zero.

limits: Personal income tax and withholding tax are not simulated in this V1.
The structural reduction is simulated for category 1 using a simplified full-time monthly implementation.
The quarterly reference wage S is approximated as monthly gross wage multiplied by 3.
Sectoral minimum wages are not simulated.
Sector-specific employer contributions are not simulated.
Manual-worker holiday pay contributions are not simulated.
Regional and family-status differences are not simulated.
Employer contribution rate is treated as a simplified base rate before structural reduction.
